text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists at arXiv:2410.02713 with the title "Video Instruction Tuning With Synthetic Data" (also titled "LLaVA-Video: Video Instruction Tuning With Synthetic Data" in later versions). The cited authors—Yuanhan Zhang, Jinming Wu, Wei Li, Bo Li, Zejun Ma, Ziwei Liu, Chunyuan Li—match the real paper's authors. The automated checker's flag appears to be a version-title mismatch (v1 used a shorter title without the "LLaVA-Video:" prefix), not a fabrication.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.02713
